difficulty.reason: Hardy, big seeds easy for child to handle, visible tendrils and pods

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Green shoots pushing up through the soil in 7-10 days

prompt.en: Look along the trellis -- any green hooks poking up yet?
prompt.da: Kig langs espalier -- er der nogen groenne kroge, der stikker op endnu?

growth_stages.name: Climbing
growth_stages.look_for: Curly tendrils reaching out and grabbing the trellis wire

prompt.en: Can you find the curly bits? Gently wrap them around the wire -- they'll hold on!
prompt.da: Kan du finde de krullede dele? Vikl dem forsigtigt om traaden -- de holder fast!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: White or pale purple butterfly-shaped flowers

prompt.en: Each flower becomes a pea pod! How many butterfly flowers can you spot?
prompt.da: Hver blomst bliver til en aertebaelg! Hvor mange sommerfugleblomster kan du se?

growth_stages.name: Pod Development
growth_stages.look_for: Flat green pods filling out, getting plump

prompt.en: Squeeze a pod gently -- can you feel the peas inside like little balls?
prompt.da: Klem forsigtigt paa en baelg -- kan du maerke aerterne indeni som smaa bolde?

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Plump pods about 7-8cm long, peas visible through the pod

prompt.en: Hold the vine with one hand, pull the pod with the other. Pop it open -- eat them raw!
prompt.da: Hold ranken med en haand, traek baelgen med den anden. Knip den op -- spis dem raa!

human_readable.en: Water when soil surface is dry. Extra water when flowering and podding.
human_readable.da: Vand naar jordoverfladen er toer. Ekstra vand under blomstring og baelgdannelse.

harvest.notes: Pick regularly to encourage more pods. Cut at ground level after harvest -- leave roots for nitrogen.

companion_plants.notes: Alliums inhibit pea growth. Peas fix nitrogen for subsequent crops.

message.en: Peas need water, especially during flowering and podding!
message.da: Aerter har brug for vand, isaer under blomstring og baelgdannelse!
